scenario.name: RTP Echo pause / start test UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] P-Asserted-Identity: "Invite" <sip:Invite@avaya.com> Supported: timer, 100rel Expires: 330 Accept: application/sdp Session-Expires: 900;refresher=uac Min-SE: 450 Allow: UPDATE,PRACK,SUBSCRIBE,REFER,INFO,NOTIFY,REGISTER,OPTIONS,BYE,INVITE,ACK,CANCEL Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sbc-uk-mr-dh06b 286452736 1572444063 IN IP4 62.239.36.229 s=sip call c=IN IP4 62.239.36.228 t=0 0 m=audio 59926 RTP/AVP 9 113 8 0 18 112 110 101 a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000 a=rtpmap:113 AMR-WB/16000 a=fmtp:113 mode-change-period=2;mode-change-neighbor=1;mode-change-capability=2;max-red=0 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:112 AMR/8000 a=fmtp:112 mode-change-period=2;mode-change-neighbor=1;mode-change-capability=2;max-red=0 a=rtpmap:110 GSM-EFR/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=silenceSupp:off - - - - a=ptime:20

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via:[$Via_486] [last_From:] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Length: 0
